display_information.name: Scope Creep Gateway
display_information.description: Catch scope creep the moment it happens - and get paid for the extra work.
display_information.long_description:
Scope creep quietly costs freelancers thousands every year - one "can you also just…" at a time.

Scope Creep Gateway is your scope guardian inside Slack. It watches your client project channels, compares every request against the brief you agreed on, and quietly flags out-of-scope asks the moment they land - privately, so only you see them.

You stay in control of every call:

Let small asks slide - and it keeps a running tally of the goodwill you've given, so you know when a client's "quick favors" have added up.

Bill the real ones - one tap drafts a professional change order with cost and timeline, ready to send.

Know your clients - see which clients creep most across all your projects, so you can price and plan accordingly.

Everything sensitive stays private to you. The app discloses its presence openly in each channel, never shares your conversations, and never uses your data to train AI - so your client relationships stay built on trust, not surveillance.

Stop doing free work you never agreed to. Start every project with a guardian watching your scope.

agent_view.agent_description: A Slack agent that helps freelancers catch scope creep early.
